Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Continued To Jan-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case no. 192302. Fred Campagnoli appearing for trustee. Randy Schmidt appearing for Judith Guilfoyle. Parties had one day mediation last week. They will go back for another day in January. Matter is continued to 1/22/07. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Compel Trustee To Make Accounting For Removal
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Continued To Nov-13-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case no. 192302. Fred Campagnoli appearing for trustee. Randy Schmidt appearing for Judith Guilfoyle. Unable to complete mediation due to health issues. Counsel is requesting for continuance to complete mediation. Matter is continued to 11/13 for status on mediation. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Compel Trustee To Make Accounting For Removal

MINI MINUTES: Case called with Case Number 192302. Charles Triay appearing for petitioner. Fred Campagnoli appearing for Nick Circosta, trustee/respondent. Parties agree to participate in mediation. Matter is continued to 8/21. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
